reviews.comment:
Muy amables y serviciales. Por ejemplo, limpiaron los vidrios de mi camioneta y no hubo modo, a pesar de mi insistencia, que aceptaran la propina. "Es nuestra cortesía" me respondieron.

(Translated by Google)
They were very kind and helpful. For example, they cleaned the windows of my truck, and despite my insistence, they wouldn't accept a tip. "It's our courtesy," they replied.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15636206636140683428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZb2NmYlR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son unos ordinarios. El precio es el mismo que en cualquier estación de servicio. Más de 2 vehículos y se llena. Pesimo

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are rude. The price is the same as at any other gas station. More than two vehicles and it's full. Terrible.
